title: Swing Speed
description: Customize your hand swing animation speed.
body:
**Swing Speed**

A lightweight mod that lets you fully customize the speed of your hand swing animation in Minecraft. Whether you want an instant, snappy response or a dramatic slow-motion swipe, Swing Speed gives you total control.

**✨ Features**
- Customizable Speed — Adjust from 10% to 100%
- In-game GUI — Press Right Shift to open the sleek configuration menu
- Real-time Slider — See and set your speed with a clean percentage-based slider
- Rebindable Key — Change the menu hotkey directly from the GUI
- Persistent Config — Settings save automatically

**🛠️ How to Use**
1. Press Right Shift to open the Swing Speed menu
2. Toggle the mod to Enabled
3. Drag the Speed Slider to your preferred speed
4. Optionally, click GUI Keybind to assign a different key

**📦 Requirements**
- Fabric API
